title: Express intent required
doc_html:
§55.  Express intent required

An acknowledgment must express the intent of the landowner to interrupt prescription and clearly identify the party making it and the mineral servitude or servitudes acknowledged.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §55, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
